ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample source */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Type of organism from which the sample is taken */,
  "organ_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism analyzed */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the organism */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease status associated with the sample */,
  "infect" TEXT /* Infection status of the sample */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the organism */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the organism */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell involved */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line from which the sample is derived */,
  "biological_replicate" TEXT /* Biological replicate status */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, blood, serum) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location from which the sample was sourced */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample */,
  "biosafety_level" TEXT /* Biosafety level of the sample */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being analyzed */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay run */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file generated from the assay */,
  "file_uri" TEXT /* URI of the data file for access */,
  "fraction_identifier" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fraction processed */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label indicating the sample type */,
  "cleavage_agent_details" TEXT /* Details about the cleavage agent used in the assay */,
  "assay_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay was conducted */,
  "assay_location" TEXT /* Location where the assay was conducted */,
  "assay_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assay */,
  "assay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assay in minutes */,
  "assay_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the assay */,
  "assay_protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol used for the assay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assays_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mass_spec_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of parameters */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the parameters */,
  "ms2_mass_analyzer" TEXT /* Type of mass analyzer used in the analysis */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the mass spectrometry */,
  "modification_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters related to modifications applied during analysis */,
  "collision_energy" REAL /* Collision energy used during fragmentation */,
  "precursor_mass_tolerance" REAL /* Allowed tolerance for precursor mass */,
  "fragment_mass_tolerance" REAL /* Allowed tolerance for fragment mass */,
  "ionization_method" TEXT /* Method used for ionization */,
  "scan_mode" TEXT /* Mode of scanning */,
  "acquisition_mode" TEXT /* Mode of acquisition */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the mass spectrometer */,
  "mass_range_start" REAL /* Starting mass range */,
  "mass_range_end" REAL /* Ending mass range */,
  "dynamic_exclusion_time" INTEGER /* Time for dynamic exclusion in seconds */,
  "isolation_window" REAL /* Isolation window for precursor ions */,
  "activation_method" TEXT /* Method used for activation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mass_spec_parameters_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modification_parameters" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated assay */,
  "modification_detail" TEXT /* Detail of the modification applied */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification */,
  "modification_site" TEXT /* Site of modification */,
  "modification_mass" REAL /* Mass of the modification */,
  "modification_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modification_parameters_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment_processes" (
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment process */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sample */,
  "enrichment_process" TEXT /* Detail of the enrichment process applied */,
  "enrichment_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrichment was performed */,
  "enrichment_method" TEXT /* Method used for enrichment */,
  "enrichment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the enrichment process in minutes */,
  "enrichment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the enrichment process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_processes_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the log */,
  "log_detail" TEXT /* Details about the analysis conducted */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for data analysis */,
  "analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis tool */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_logs_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assay */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
